# BCChina global Copilot instructions

## General
- Always align output to business value and delivery feasibility.
- Never invent APIs, tables, endpoints, or services.
- Always state assumptions and open questions.

## Product output
Use:
- Problem
- Users
- Scope
- User stories
- Acceptance criteria
- Risks

## Engineering output
Always include:
- Architecture impact
- Modules/files affected
- API/data changes
- Test strategy
- Validation steps

## UI work
Separate:
- Layout
- Components
- State
- Data dependencies
- Responsive behavior
